---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or a new backend
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?

A clear description of the feature or backend you'd like to see.

## Why

The problem it solves or the use case it enables.

## Notes

For a new compression backend, link its library/docs and say which model families
and traits it's good at (fast / smallest / no-calibration / calibrated …) — see the
"Adding a compression backend" section in CONTRIBUTING.md.
